titleStmt.title: SII 7.321: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 321. (A.R. No. 131 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP OUTSIDE THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . jayādbhudeya śālivāhanaśakavaruśa 1507 yēḷane saṁ
du yaṁṭaneya varttamāna pārthivasaṁvatsarada kārttika śu 12 bhaUmāsaradalū śrimanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa sadāśivarāyaru vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadalū
kuḷitu sakala va(ṁ)rnnāśramadhar(ṁ)mmaṁgaḷanu pratipālisuva kāladalū . A rāyara nirūpadiṁda keḷadi
ya sadāśivarāyanāyakara moṁmaga rāmarājanāyakara nirūpadiṁda bārakūrarājyavanu A
ccappavoḍeyaru pratipālisuva kāladalū . śrī mūṟukēriya sōmanāthadēvara saṁnidhiyalū
mūṟukēriya halara muṁdiṭu nārasiṁhaseṭiyara maga kaluḍicibaḷiya nāraṇaseṭṭiya
ru kaṭṭiśida maṭada gaḍi vivara mūḍalu sōmanāthadēvara rājāṁgaṇadiṁda paḍuva teṁka Aka
llānavāsigaḷa gaḍiyiṁ baḍaga paḍuvala Agrahārada gaḍiyiṁ mūḍa baḍaga billaya saṁkaṁma na
maṭada gaḍi Aribaḷiya hūvinahittila gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu yiṁttī nāluku gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
voḷageUḷa maṭadalū pratidinadalū Uṁba brahmara ja 6 ke tāU badha brahmādāyada
bāḷiṁdalū naḍava Akki mu 60 kke biṭa staḷada vivara guṁḍumeya paḍuva kere mūḍinali nā
bayaloḷage gōjaraḍi baḷiya Arasiṭi māliṁga seṭiya huṭu A māliṁgaseṭiya maṭhada ma
. ne barasuvadakke boppeniṁta bāḷa catussīmaya vivara muḍalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu māliṁ
gaseṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu samudradiṁdaṁ muḍalu baḍagalu māḷecaṁṇa bittuva
gēṇi bāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁttī nālkugaḍiyiṁdaṁvoḷage bittuva bedegaṇagilu nagaṁḍugadalu bittu
vamu 1ø voṁdu mukalu mattaṁ muḍalu māḷacaṁṇa bittuva gēṇi bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu māḷi
caṁṇa bittuva bāḷa gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu samudradiṁdaṁ muḍalu . baḍagalu narasimaṁṇase
ṭi gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī nalkugaḍiyiṁvoḷage bittu mu ø muvatu hane gade Ubhayaṁ bittu mu 2Ø
yeraḍuvare mūḍe 3 gadde yidake gēṇi Akkiteru dēvasvakeḷada kālaṁ prati sudadayadalu nāgaṁḍugadalu
Aki mu 14 hadhinālkumuḍe Ayinuṟu maṭada śasanakke māliṁgaseṭi voppidanu . maṁ murukēri
ya halara keyya Arthapa koṭu māḍikoṁḍa bāḷu haṁdaṭinalū . dēvappahaṁde bittuva nāya
ramalada bāḷiṁdalū halaru kōṭisutigeya bageyalli dēvappahaṁdeyiṁda kalaṁ prati naḍasuva Akki
mu 7 yeḷu muḍe Akki . mattaṁ bhaṁḍemaṭadalu koreme kalukūra kaḷa huṭu bācuṁ caḷiyagadeya
gaḍi vivara muḍalu murukēri halara bage kōcināyara gaddeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍaga . paḍuva teṁkalu be
baḷiyavara citaleya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍaga . paḍuvalu . kalukūra keḷagaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍalu baḍaga
lu svāmiAyyanavara gaḍi sadāvarttiya maṭada bāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁttī nalku gaḍiyiṁ vo
muḍe 3 kke gēṇi muḍe 10 ka Ayyanavara tterige muḍe 3
bada brahmadāyada bāḷa catusīme
seṭiti jīyagaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva . teṁka
gaḍiyiṁ
Digital edition of SII 7.321 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
